subcodes.first_line: O cherished friend! That which thou didst pen and treasure within thy heart hath become manifest, and thy fervent supplication hath been unveiled. Whatever lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار نازنین آنچه نگاشتی و در دل داشتی پدیدار و خواهش آشکار گشت هرچه ناله و
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
